steps.title: Combine the repeated group
steps.content: Both terms contain the same group, $(t+4)$. Combine the coefficients first: $$6(t+4)-9(t+4)=(6-9)(t+4)=-3(t+4).$$

steps.title: Solve the simplified equation
steps.content: Now solve $$-3(t+4)=45.$$ Divide by $-3$ to get $t+4=-15$, then subtract $4$: $$t=-19.$$
